MOORE
SOME EXPERTS SPECULATE THAT MOORE'S LAW WILL CEASE TO HOLD TRUE AROUND THE LATE 2020S OR EARLY 2030S DUE TO PHYSICAL LIMITATIONS IN TRANSISTOR SHRINKAGE AND HEAT DISSIPATION ISSUES.
***
OTHER ANALYSTS ARGUE THAT THE LAW WILL NOT STOP ENTIRELY BUT WILL EVOLVE AS THE INDUSTRY ADOPTS NEW ARCHITECTURES LIKE THREE-DIMENSIONAL STACKING AND ALTERNATIVE MATERIALS TO SUSTAIN PERFORMANCE GROWTH.
MOORE
